arts.ttl: Player arriving at Manchester United today “for medical and announcement”
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly closing in on their first signing of the January transfer window in the form of talented young Paraguayan left-back Diego Leon. arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford transfer will be OFF if AC Milan sign Kyle Walker from Man City
arts.sum: REVEALED: Manchester City defender Kyle Walker has emerged as a serious target for AC Milan - but they will be unable to pursue a deal for Marcus Rashford if they do opt to sign Walker

arts.ttl: Victor Osimhen told what to do if Ruben Amorim tries to sign him for Manchester United this month
arts.sum: Victor Osimhen is being linked with a move to Manchester United this month and the striker has been given advice should an offer arrive. Osimhen...

arts.ttl: Barcelona rival Arsenal for “key target” who Mikel Arteta described as a “top player”
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly making Newcastle United striker and rumoured Arsenal transfer target Alexander Isak one of their priorities. The talented Sweden international is really enjoying his football at the moment, scoring ten goals and providing two assists in his last nine games in all competitions. arts.ttl: “He will play all the positions” – Zlatan backs Marcus Rashford as Manchester United to AC Milan drama continues
arts.sum: On Saturday, Gazzetta dello Sport had what is now becoming a daily big splash on AC Milan potentially signing Marcus Rashford from Manchester United. The attacker has been edged towards the exit door at Old Trafford, and the Rossoneri are perhaps the club fighting hardest to sign him. arts.ttl: Manchester United close in on first January signing as Diego Leon flies in for medical
arts.sum: The left-back is set to finalise a deal which will see him join when he turns 18

arts.ttl: Man United boss Ruben Amorim faces major issue with Red Devils "very consistent at losing games" - Tomasz Kuszczak
arts.sum: Former Manchester United goalkeeper Tomasz Kuszczak tells Sports Mole that the Red Devils need to address their consistency problems in order to thrive under Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: I regret leaving Arsenal for Man Utd - I wanted to rip up contract straight away
arts.sum: After just one training session with Manchester United back in 2018, Alexis Sanchez was already contemplating tearing up his contract and yearning for a return to Arsenal. In his first season, a victorious FA Cup run coupled with netting an impressive 25 goals in various competitions earned him Arsenal's Player of the Year accolade.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Borussia Dortmund, Napoli 'serious contenders' for Red Devils attacker after fresh development
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund and Napoli are allegedly both firmly in the race to sign Manchester United attacker Marcus Rashford before the end of the month.

arts.ttl: Arsenal legend makes Man United transfer admission about Ruben Amorim’s squad
arts.sum: Nigel Winterburn has told Ruben Amorim that he need not worry about Premier League rivals poaching his current Manchester United squad given their performances this season
